title: Most Americans don’t want an AI data centre next door. Virginia shows why some say yes
summary: That makes data centres less welcome than any other structure Redfin asked about: 39% oppose a new apartment block, and 32% a mixed-use development. Data centres strain power and water , raise noise, and drop large industrial buildings into residential areas.
caption: output/2026-07-22/most-americans-don-t-want-an-ai-data-centre-next-door-virginia-shows-w.txt
